codeReview.summary: Reviewed both relevant commits: 7ac78f6 introduced the triggerDeploy regression by treating all decode errors as malformed JSON, and 4255aef fixes it by exempting io.EOF. The updated handler now preserves empty-body default-to-main behavior while still returning 400 for malformed JSON decode errors. No regressions were identified in the reviewed change.

summary: Pass. The fix adequately resolves the original blocking io.EOF handling failure in triggerDeploy and does not introduce new issues in the reviewed scope.
